title: Backend Developer Vacancy at iGate India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at iGate India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
iGate India Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About iGate India Global Group:
iGate India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India Global Group!
